name: prequel-an-american-fight-against-fascism
description: Rachel Maddow's 'Prequel: An American Fight Against Fascism' — the untold story of the American fascist movement in the 1930s and 1940s. A network of Nazi agents, homegrown fascists, and Congressional collaborators who tried to undermine American democracy before World War II — and the courageous journalists, prosecutors, and antifascist spies who stopped them.
useCase: Understanding pre-WWII American fascism, how Nazis infiltrated the US, the sedition trials, Congressional collaboration, media manipulation, and the parallels to modern democracy threats.
knownRisks: Some content may be distressing (antisemitism, racial violence)
Maddow is a liberal commentator — not an unbiased historian
The cast of characters is large and complex
Some claims rely on recently discovered archival material
